case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. SHULA BENSIMON ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-28-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-01-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2022 CONTINUED TO MAY-03-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENSIMON, SHULA , AN INDIVIDUAL $4,348.99 PRINCIPAL, $357.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,705.99, SEE SCANNED DOC
